title: Pan-Seared Irish Snapper
description: A light and flavorful dish showcasing the tender flavor of Irish snapper, roasted to perfection.
instructions: Season the snapper fillets with salt and pepper.
Heat the olive oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat. Add the snapper fillets and sear for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and roast for 8-10 minutes or until the snapper is cooked through.
Meanwhile, sauté the sliced red onion and minced garlic in a separate pan with a small amount of oil until softened.
To serve, place the snapper on a plate, top with the sautéed onion and garlic mixture, and garnish with parsley.
